title: Instituto Nacional de Derechos Humanos ransomware incident

extortion.description: indh.cl zoominfo.com/c/instituto-nacional-de-derechos-humanos-indh/434184671 The Instituto Nacional de Derechos Humanos (INDH) is a state institution in Chile that autonomously promotes a culture of respect for human rights, monitors the actions of the Chilean state according to established standards, and protects the dignity of all individuals residing in the nation. It provides concrete solutions aimed at improving the lives of people and addresses various human rights issues, such as economic
